requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (O'zDSt / CISPR 14 adoption)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（O'zDSt / 采用CISPR 14）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（O'zDSt / 採用CISPR 14）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Uzbekistan market are expected to meet electromagnetic compatibility requirements based on the national adoption of the CISPR 14 family (emission and immunity for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus), administered through O'zStandart under O'zDSt standards (which adopt IEC/CISPR and legacy GOST). The emission requirements correspond to CISPR 14-1 (conducted and radiated disturbance limits for appliances, including brush-type and induction motors and associated switching electronics relevant to modern inverter-driven compressors), and immunity to CISPR 14-2. Radio-related aspects fall under the national radio regulator where any wireless function is present. Demonstration is typically via test reports referenced in the O'zStandart certification or declaration of conformity; for appliances with no intentional radio transmitter, the assessment is limited to the EMC emission/immunity scope rather than a separate radio-equipment approval.
summary.zh: 投放乌兹别克斯坦市场的家用制冷器具应满足以国家采用CISPR 14系列（家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的发射与抗扰度）为基础的电磁兼容要求，由O'zStandart依据O'zDSt标准（采用IEC/CISPR及沿用的GOST）管理。发射要求对应CISPR 14-1（器具的传导与辐射骚扰限值，涵盖换向器电动机型、感应电动机型及与现代变频压缩机相关的开关电子设备），抗扰度对应CISPR 14-2。涉及无线功能时，无线电相关事项归国家无线电监管机构管辖。证明通常通过在O'zStandart认证或合格声明中引用的检测报告完成；对于不含有意发射的无线电发射机的器具，评定仅限于EMC发射/抗扰度范围，而非单独的无线电设备审批。
summary.zht: 投放烏茲別克市場的家用製冷器具應滿足以國家採用CISPR 14系列（家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的發射與抗擾度）為基礎的電磁相容要求，由O'zStandart依據O'zDSt標準（採用IEC/CISPR及沿用的GOST）管理。發射要求對應CISPR 14-1（器具的傳導與輻射騷擾限值，涵蓋換向器電動機型、感應電動機型及與現代變頻壓縮機相關的開關電子設備），抗擾度對應CISPR 14-2。涉及無線功能時，無線電相關事項歸國家無線電監管機構管轄。證明通常通過在O'zStandart認證或合格聲明中引用的檢測報告完成；對於不含有意發射的無線電發射機的器具，評定僅限於EMC發射/抗擾度範圍，而非單獨的無線電設備審批。

standards_or_laws: O'zDSt adoption of CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (administered by O'zStandart)
O'zDSt adoption of CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard
Uzbekistan national radio regulator — radio-equipment requirements applicable only where a wireless function (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth) is present

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). Harmonic emissions are covered by GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020). These are enforced under the CCC regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both China and Uzbekistan derive their appliance EMC requirements from the CISPR 14 family, the underlying limits and test methods are closely aligned, but a Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test report is not itself an Uzbek conformity document.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求依据GB 4343.1-2018（电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行。谐波发射由GB 17625.1-2022（强制性；等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）涵盖。上述标准在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC制度下执行。由于中国与乌兹别克斯坦的器具电磁兼容要求均源自CISPR 14系列，底层限值与试验方法高度一致，但中国GB 4343.1 CCC检测报告本身并非乌方合格文件。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求依據GB 4343.1-2018（電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行。諧波發射由GB 17625.1-2022（強制性；等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）涵蓋。上述標準在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC制度下執行。由於中國與烏茲別克的器具電磁相容要求均源自CISPR 14系列，底層限值與試驗方法高度一致，但中國GB 4343.1 CCC檢測報告本身並非烏方合格文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Because both regimes are CISPR 14-based, the EMC gap is mainly documentary: (1) The Uzbek O'zStandart certificate or declaration must reference the O'zDSt/CISPR 14 adoption; a Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test report is not directly accepted but the equivalence to CISPR 14-1 means CB-style or accredited IEC/CISPR test data can often be re-used as supporting evidence — confirm with the conformity-assessment body. (2) Edition alignment: GB 4343.1-2018 follows CISPR 14-1:2016, so manufacturers should check which CISPR 14-1 edition the Uzbek adoption references and whether any newer-edition provisions (e.g., for switched-mode supplies and inverter compressors) apply. (3) Inverter-compressor models — verify that existing emission test configurations cover variable-speed inverter operation per the referenced CISPR 14-1 edition. (4) If the appliance includes a wireless (smart-home) function, a separate radio-equipment requirement under the national radio regulator applies in addition to the EMC scope.
gap.zh: 由于两套制度均以CISPR 14为基础，电磁兼容差距主要是文件性的：（1）乌方O'zStandart证书或声明须引用O'zDSt/CISPR 14采用标准；中国GB 4343.1 CCC检测报告不被直接接受，但其与CISPR 14-1的等效性意味着CB式或认可的IEC/CISPR检测数据通常可作为支撑证据复用——请向合格评定机构确认。（2）版本对齐：GB 4343.1-2018遵循CISPR 14-1:2016，制造商应核实乌方采用标准引用的CISPR 14-1版本，以及是否适用任何较新版本的规定（如针对开关电源和变频压缩机）。（3）变频压缩机型号——核实现有发射测试配置是否按所引用的CISPR 14-1版本涵盖变频运行。（4）若器具含无线（智能家居）功能，则除EMC范围外，还须遵守国家无线电监管机构的单独无线电设备要求。
gap.zht: 由於兩套制度均以CISPR 14為基礎，電磁相容差距主要是文件性的：（1）烏方O'zStandart證書或聲明須引用O'zDSt/CISPR 14採用標準；中國GB 4343.1 CCC檢測報告不被直接接受，但其與CISPR 14-1的等效性意味著CB式或認可的IEC/CISPR檢測數據通常可作為支撐證據複用——請向合格評定機構確認。（2）版本對齊：GB 4343.1-2018遵循CISPR 14-1:2016，製造商應核實烏方採用標準引用的CISPR 14-1版本，以及是否適用任何較新版本的規定（如針對開關電源和變頻壓縮機）。（3）變頻壓縮機型號——核實現有發射測試配置是否按所引用的CISPR 14-1版本涵蓋變頻運行。（4）若器具含無線（智慧家居）功能，則除EMC範圍外，還須遵守國家無線電監管機構的單獨無線電設備要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC compliance against the O'zDSt/CISPR 14 adoption is required and referenced in the O'zStandart certificate or declaration of conformity; radio-equipment approval additionally applies where a wireless function is present
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC for Uzbekistan is assessed against the O'zDSt/CISPR 14 adoption referenced in the O'zStandart certificate or declaration. Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test data is not directly accepted, but its CISPR 14-1 equivalence means accredited IEC/CISPR (CB-style) reports can often be re-used — confirm edition alignment and inverter-compressor coverage with the conformity-assessment body. A wireless function triggers a separate national radio-equipment requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌兹别克斯坦的电磁兼容依据O'zStandart证书或声明所引用的O'zDSt/CISPR 14采用标准评定。中国GB 4343.1 CCC检测数据不被直接接受，但其与CISPR 14-1的等效性意味着认可的IEC/CISPR（CB式）报告通常可复用——请向合格评定机构确认版本对齐及变频压缩机覆盖情况。无线功能将触发单独的国家无线电设备要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏茲別克的電磁相容依據O'zStandart證書或聲明所引用的O'zDSt/CISPR 14採用標準評定。中國GB 4343.1 CCC檢測數據不被直接接受，但其與CISPR 14-1的等效性意味著認可的IEC/CISPR（CB式）報告通常可複用——請向合格評定機構確認版本對齊及變頻壓縮機覆蓋情況。無線功能將觸發單獨的國家無線電設備要求。
